questions.prompt: Can another team verify this artifact offline?
questions.notes: The nested proof pack verifies offline without trusting the producer.

questions.prompt: Did the specimen capture runtime evidence from a real wrapped run?
questions.notes: The proof pack contains at least one receipt emitted during the wrapped specimen run.

questions.prompt: Does this specimen establish legal or regulatory compliance?
questions.scope: Out of scope for the specimen
questions.out_of_scope_note: This artifact demonstrates evidence mechanics, not legal conclusions.
